Leave empty to use the first courtyard r: Zalyshte porozhnim, shchob vykorystaty pershyi dvir, povernanyi khmaroiu iGarden. Yakshcho dvoriv kilka, vstanovit potribnyi ID z zhurnalu adaptera.
Creates raw states under devices.<device: Stvoriuie syri stany u devices.<device>.raw.dp_<id>. Zapysuvani syri stany vidpovidaiut khmarnomu dpMode i korysni dlia diahnostyky.
